next_target.recommendation: Target the current post-#468 GDN decode cluster, starting with :kiln/gdn/conv only if static audit shows it is not already fully covered by the existing chunk/causal-conv vendoring path; otherwise move to the adjacent :kiln/gdn/gates + :kiln/gdn/gated_norm cluster.
next_target.rationale: The successful post-#468 decode window attribution has :kiln/gdn/conv at 15.4%, :kiln/gdn/gates at 14.2%, and :kiln/gdn/gated_norm at 13.4%; full-attention/MTP parent ranges are smaller.
